ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solar_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar event */,
  "time_start" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "time_peak" TEXT /* Peak time of the event */,
  "time_end" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "nar" INTEGER /* Non-potentiality index */,
  "xray_class" TEXT /* X-ray class of the flare */,
  "coincidence" INTEGER /* Indicator of coincidence with other events */,
  "usflux" REAL /* Total unsigned flux */,
  "meangam" REAL /* Mean gamma */,
  "meangbt" REAL /* Mean total field */,
  "meangbz" REAL /* Mean vertical field */,
  "meangbh" REAL /* Mean horizontal field */,
  "meanjzd" REAL /* Mean vertical current density */,
  "totusjz" REAL /* Total unsigned vertical current */,
  "meanjzh" REAL /* Mean horizontal current density */,
  "totusjh" REAL /* Total horizontal current */,
  "absnjzh" REAL /* Absolute value of the net current helicity */,
  "savncpp" REAL /* Savitzky-Golay of the net current helicity */,
  "meanpot" REAL /* Mean absolute potential */,
  "totpot" REAL /* Total absolute potential */,
  "meanshr" REAL /* Mean shear angle */,
  "shrgt45" REAL /* Shear angle greater than 45 degrees */,
  "r_value" REAL /* R-value (non-potentiality index) */,
  "area_acr" REAL /* Area above a certain threshold */,
  "g_s" REAL /* Gaussian smoothing parameter */,
  "slf" REAL /* Self-flux */,
  "d_l_f" REAL /* Distance from the limb */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the solar event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the solar event on the Sun's surface */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of solar event */,
  "event_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the solar event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the satellite was launched */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date the satellite was decommissioned */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the satellite */,
  "satellite_status" TEXT /* Current status of the satellite */,
  "orbital_position" TEXT /* Orbital position of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_satellite" (
  "event_satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event-satellite association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data collected by the satellite for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_satellite_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES solar_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_satellite_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flare_classes" (
  "flare_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flare class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the flare class (e.g., B, C, M, X) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flare class */,
  "class_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the flare class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flare_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_flare_class" (
  "event_flare_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event-flare class association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event */,
  "flare_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flare class */,
  "flare_class_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level in the assigned flare class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_flare_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_flare_class_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES solar_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_flare_class_flare_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("flare_class_id") REFERENCES flare_classes ("flare_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnetic_field_types" (
  "magnetic_field_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnetic field type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the magnetic field type (e.g., Total, Vertical, Horizontal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the magnetic field type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the magnetic field type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("magnetic_field_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_magnetic_field" (
  "event_magnetic_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event-magnetic field association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event */,
  "magnetic_field_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the magnetic field type */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the magnetic field measurement */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the magnetic field measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_magnetic_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_magnetic_field_magnetic_field_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("magnetic_field_type_id") REFERENCES magnetic_field_types ("magnetic_field_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_magnetic_field_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES solar_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's institution or organization */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* User's area of research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES solar_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the forecast model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Data used to train the forecast model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_forecast" (
  "event_forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event-forecast association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast model */,
  "predicted_time" TEXT /* Predicted time of the event */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time of the event */,
  "forecast_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level in the forecast */,
  "forecast_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_forecast_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_forecast_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES solar_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_images_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES solar_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event the video belongs to */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "video_size" REAL /* Size of the video in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the video file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_videos_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES solar_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_events" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event */,
  "event_role" TEXT /* Role of the event in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_publications" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_publications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES solar_events ("event_id")
)
